data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T12:57 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.text: Deacon, checking in.

content.content:
? skogtown-wisp-wisp-0sysw [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-22 · Updated: 2026-02-22

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

CHILDREN
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-3ujyw: Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-78tsv: Scan agent health ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-c7tku: Check for orphaned processes ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-ogvg8: Decide: loop or hand off ● P2

content.thinking: All children are marked with ✓ (completed). This patrol wisp is fully done. I need to check `bd mol current` to see if there's a current step, or if the patrol is complete and I should squash and create a new one.

content.text: All steps completed. Squashing and starting fresh patrol.

input.command: gt mol squash --jitter 10s --summary "Patrol complete: all steps done from previous session"
input.description: Squash completed patrol wisp to digest

content.thinking: The mail inbox crashed with a nil pointer dereference in the Dolt database driver. This is a known type of issue with the beads/dolt backend. Let me try again - sometimes these are transient. If it persists, I'll note it and move on.

content.text: Mail inbox crashed (Dolt nil pointer dereference). Retrying once.
Good, mail recovered. No messages. Closing inbox check step.
